stemHtml: ATC instructs a complete turn for spacing. Which exchange is correct?

options.a: "F-GO, MAKE A COMPLETE TURN LEFT" / "COMPLETE TURN LEFT, F-GO"
options.b: "F-GO, THREE HUNDRED SIXTY LEFT" / "THREE HUNDRED SIXTY LEFT, F-GO"
options.c: "F-GO, MAKE A THREE SIXTY TURN LEFT" / "THREE SIXTY TURN LEFT, F-GO"
